title: Shadow Agents: How SentinelOne Secures the AI Tools That Act Like Users

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - Shadow Agents: How SentinelOne Secures the AI Tools That Act
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/30
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*dst.ip.address*'
            - '*dst.port.number*'
            - '*e.trim*'
            - '*endpoint.name*'
            - '*event.time*'
            - '*event.type*'
            - '*g.length*'
            - '*src.ip.address*'
            - '*src.port.number*'
            - '*src.process.cmdline*'
            - '*src.process.parent.name*'
            - '*src.process.parent.publisher*'
            - '*src.process.storyline.id*'
            - '*src.process.user*'
            - '*task.name*'
    condition: selection_ip
level: high
